Hardware.ModelTierMismatchMessage: Detected VRAM suggests a lower tier than some models you have installed. Routing may prefer smaller models until GPU memory is read correctly. If you recently changed GPUs or drivers, restart the app.

Common.TransferFileFormatDescription: Choose which format you want to transfer.
Common.TransferImportBodyHint: Import reads content from a file and merges it into your library.
Common.TransferExportBodyHint: Export writes your content to a file you can reuse elsewhere.
Common.TransferImportSettingsDescription: Control how existing items and unknown fields are handled.

Settings.Title: Settings
Settings.CategoryDescription: Manage how Mnemo looks and behaves.
Settings.AIToolsExperimentalSubtitle: Install and manage on-device models, and configure the assistant. Local AI is experimental and may change between updates.
Settings.ExperimentalLocalAINoticeDescription: Local Atlas AI is experimental. Downloads, hardware detection, and the assistant can change or break between app updates. Use at your own risk.
Settings.OpenAIManagerDescription: Install bundles, see what is on disk, and download missing pieces. You can close this window; downloads continue in the background.
Settings.AIManagerOverlayExperimentalLine: Experimental — model bundles and hardware detection may change between app updates.
Settings.ProfilePictureDescription: Your profile photo in the app.
Settings.DisplayNameDescription: Visible to others when you share notes.
Settings.LaunchAtStartupDescription: Automatically start Mnemo when you log in.
Settings.ClearCacheDescription: Delete cached data to free disk space.
Settings.EnableGamificationDescription: Track XP, streaks, and levels as you learn.
Settings.EnableToastsDescription: Show pop-up toasts in the corner. When off, new alerts appear only in the notification list.
Settings.AutoSaveDescription: Save changes automatically every few seconds.
Settings.SpellCheckDescription: Underline misspelled words in the editor.
Settings.SpellCheckLanguagesDescription: Choose the language used for spell checking.
Settings.SpellCheckCustomWordsDescription: Optional comma-separated words to always accept.
Settings.EditorWidthDescription: Maximum width of the editor content column.
Settings.BlockSpacingDescription: Vertical spacing between blocks and sections.
Settings.BaseFontSizeDescription: Default text size for rendered notes.
Settings.EnableAIAssistantDescription: Use the assistant to write, summarize, and organize.
Settings.EnableAIAssistantWarningTitle: AI is still in heavy development
Settings.EnableAIAssistantWarningMessage: Mnemo AI features are not ready for everyday use yet. Expect instability, mistakes, and frequent changes. Proceed only if you are experimenting.
Settings.WipeInputForDictationDescription: When on, voice input replaces the current text; when off, it appends.
Settings.ChatStreamingRevealDescription: How quickly assistant text appears. Slower modes can be easier to read.
Settings.SmartUnitGenerationDescription: Generate the first unit on creation; add more on demand.
Settings.GpuAccelerationDescription: Use the GPU for AI when available. Disable to force CPU if you hit stability or performance issues.
Settings.UnloadTimeoutDescription: Unload models after inactivity to free memory.
Settings.EnableRAGDescription: Lets the assistant reference larger uploads via embeddings. When off, available context is more limited.
Settings.InstallLocalAIDescription: Downloads Atlas AI from the official Mnemo release: llama.cpp server, embeddings, orchestration model, speech, and a chat bundle sized for your GPU tier. You can close this window; the download continues in the background.
Settings.EmbeddingModelDescription: Model used to index your library. Smaller models are faster and use less memory.
Settings.ClearChatHistoryDescription: Remove every saved assistant conversation, memory, and related embeddings from this device.
Settings.ClearChatHistoryConfirmMessage: This deletes every chat thread and cannot be undone.
Settings.AppThemeDescription: Choose the visual style of the application.
Settings.AppIconDescription: Taskbar or dock icon for Mnemo.
Settings.GridTypeDescription: Background grid style on the canvas.
Settings.ShiftBehaviourDescription: On empty canvas: drag to select a region or pan. Ctrl+drag extends selection.
Settings.ShowMinimapDescription: When to show the overview: Auto (when zoomed out), On, or Off.
Settings.GlobalQuickActionsDescription: Alt+Shift+Q opens the quick action menu.
Settings.KeybindManagerDescription: View bindings, conflicts, and reset saved overrides to defaults.
Settings.AutoCheckUpdatesDescription: On each launch, Mnemo may check GitHub for a newer version (rate-limited).
Settings.UpdateAvailableSubtitleFormat: Version {0} is available. Release notes below.
Settings.UpdatesSkippedVersionActive: You chose to skip this version. Clear that in the database or wait for a newer tag.
Settings.UpdatesAvailableSeeSettingsBadge: Update available — see the dot on Settings in the sidebar.
Settings.UpdatesNavigateToOverview: Open Overview or Settings to see the update prompt.

Onboarding.PostOnboardingWelcomeMessage: You're all set. Start from Overview or use the sidebar anytime.
Onboarding.WelcomeDescription: This application is under active development. Features may change and data formats are not yet final. Use at your own risk.
Onboarding.PersonalizeDescription: Pick a name, colors, and a profile picture so Mnemo feels like yours. You can change these anytime in Settings.
Onboarding.LanguageDescription: Pick the language you want Mnemo to use.
Onboarding.AISetupDescription: We detected your hardware tier and list what is already on disk versus what is still missing. Required packs bring chat, embeddings, and the server online. Optional “image” packs add vision (mmproj) for the same tier. Estimated size uses the release file sizes when available.
Onboarding.HardwareTierLow: Hardware tier: low (integrated or small VRAM — we use the small chat bundle).
Onboarding.HardwareTierMid: Hardware tier: mid (moderate VRAM — we use the middle chat bundle).
Onboarding.HardwareTierHigh: Hardware tier: high (large VRAM — we use the large chat bundle plus optional vision).
Onboarding.VisionOptionFormat: Also download optional vision attachment “{0}” (multimodal projector, same folder as the chat model).
Onboarding.EstimatedDownloadFormat: Estimated download for the selection above: ~{0} (from release zip sizes when reported by the server).
Onboarding.EstimatedSizeUnknown: Could not estimate total size (server did not report all zip sizes).
Onboarding.DownloadTransparency: Downloads come from GitHub release “Models” on onemnemo/mnemo. Each zip is unpacked under %LocalAppData%\mnemo\models. Text models use .gguf files; vision adds .mmproj next to them. Nothing is uploaded from your machine.
Onboarding.AllModelsInstalled: Atlas AI is already set up on this computer.
Onboarding.AppIconDescription: The small picture for Mnemo in the taskbar.

Path.Title: Learning Path
Path.Subtitle: Organize your knowledge and track your progress

Chat.DeleteChatMessage: This conversation will be removed from your history. This cannot be undone.
Chat.WelcomeMessage: Hi, I'm your Mnemo assistant. Ask me to explain a concept, summarize a lesson, or help you practice.
Chat.ErrorSorry: I'm sorry, I couldn't generate a response.
Chat.ErrorUnexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
Chat.Disclaimer: AI can make mistakes. Verify important information.
Chat.MemoryPillTooltipHint: Conversation memory for this thread (facts from tools, rolling summary, and optional long-term recall).
Chat.MemoryPillTier3On: Long-term recall: embedded in knowledge store for this chat.

Notes.SelectOrCreateNote: Select a note or create a new one
Notes.DeleteNoteConfirmMessage: “{0}” will be permanently removed. This cannot be undone.
Notes.DeleteFolderConfirmMessage: Folder “{0}” and everything inside it will be permanently removed. This cannot be undone.
Notes.ResetEditorZoomTip: 100% zoom and top of note (Ctrl+0). Middle-click drag or Alt+drag to pan. Ctrl+scroll to zoom.
Notes.ExportFormatUnavailableMessage: This export format is not available right now.

NotesEditor.PageDescription: Create a nested note opened from this block
NotesEditor.ImageImportFailed: Could not import the image. Please try again.
NotesEditor.CrossBlockLinkHint: Selection spans multiple blocks. Only the link address is set here; each block keeps its own selected text.

Topbar.GlobalSearchOverlayHint: Global search is opening here. Full results and actions are coming next.
Topbar.ConfirmExitMessage: Are you sure you want to close Mnemo?

Keybinds.keybindManager.subtitle: Actions are shown for this device. Reset restores defaults.
Keybinds.keybindManager.editorCaptureHint: Hold modifiers and press a key, for example Ctrl + Shift + H
